message:
feat: add content analysis to stats command (xf-11.2.3)

Adds --content flag to stats command with comprehensive content analysis:
- Media/link/reply ratio percentages
- Self-thread count vs standalone tweets
- Average tweet length with length distribution chart
- Top hashtags extracted from JSON column
- Top mentions extracted from JSON column

Uses efficient SQL queries with JSON parsing for hashtag/mention aggregation.
Fixed UTF-8 safety bug in truncate_text (uses char count, not byte slicing).
Fixed NULL handling in query_avg_length for empty tables.
All 135 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -178,6 +178,10 @@ pub struct StatsArgs {
     #[arg(long)]
     pub engagement: bool,
 
+    /// Show content analysis (media/link ratios, length distribution, hashtags, mentions)
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub content: bool,
+
     /// Number of top items to show
     #[arg(long, short = 'n', default_value = "10")]
     pub top: usize,
